items.title: The only Thunderers that Chet Holmgren has more field goal attempts than are Isaiah Joe, Aaron Wiggins and Nikola Topic. Unfortunately, none of them have played yet.
items.author: Tom Ziller
items.body_excerpt: The only Thunderers that Chet Holmgren has more field goal attempts than are Isaiah Joe, Aaron Wiggins and Nikola Topic. Unfortunately, none of them have played yet.

items.title: Jared McCain and Aaron Wiggins missed 18 of 21 shots in Game 4
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Jared McCain and Aaron Wiggins missed 18 of 21 shots in Game 4

Those were the only two Thunderbuddies who attempted 10+ field goals besides Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and Isaiah Hartenstein
